props.label: This button allows you to access the “Contacts” database. This database is for storing contact information; i.e.  New Clients, Vendors, perspective clients, lumber suppliers etc..
Estimate should show information about a potential new job. Include all materials and labor information available, and use the [TAB] key to go from line to line.

The Labor posting input screen is for entering hours and labor information.  Normally
this is done once a week on Monday.  The time sheet information for each Cabinetmaker
is entered into this database.  The date entered should be the week ending date for
the time worked.
The fax cover sheet has a single field for entering the body of the note. Don’t forget to enter job numbers.
This report looks at the job as it was originally written and compares costs to current dollars
This report looks at costs per job in a list format
This is the estimate form with formatting removed
Use to enter labor process hours
Use to enter lumber costs for a job
Use to create a Note for a job
Use to enter other costs for a job
Use to enter plywood costs for a job
Not normally used; designed to enter or update wood costs
Used to create POs for jobs or shop work - should always have a job assigned to them
If a PO has more than 18 items, this is the second page; text appears on the PO layout to indicate that there is a second page
Review costs for jobs meeting criteria
Menus allow you to move to sections of the database where you can perform specific functions.
Analysis of labor costs for jobs, after setting search criteria
Analysis of item costs for jobs, after setting search criteria
Listing of labor processes for a job with totals

This is the first menu you see when you open the Jaeger & Ernst database
system.
These are the buttons you will see on the Main Menu screen

This button will take you to the “Posting Menu” screen. The posting menu is where
you can access the Labor, Lumber, Plywood, and Other databases to enter specific
information.
